title: Resource Rise
description: In this CREATE oriented Modpack YOUR goal is to gather 100k off all obtainable items and blocks. How you do it is up to you!
body:
# Resource Rise
## What is this modpack about?
In this modpack your task is to gather 100k of every item. How and how fast you do it is up to you!

## What mods can I use?
Currenly only Create and Computercraft. But you can also use vanilla redstone!

## For servers:
To use this pack on your server you can just use the client mods and remove Distant horisons (it crashes the server)

## Why did I Create this pack?
Because I was bored :)
